sources.name: TACO
sources.role: loose litter / trash object detection supplement

blocked_or_deferred_sources.roboflow_overflow: ROBOFLOW_API_KEY or manual export is required before adding full / empty / overflow scene-status data.
blocked_or_deferred_sources.roboflow_yolov5_garbage_detection: Roboflow export/API access is required before adding this 5980-image candidate source.
blocked_or_deferred_sources.mendeley_trash_detection: The static page did not expose a stable direct file URL in this environment.
blocked_or_deferred_sources.large_kaggle_candidates: Several Kaggle candidates are documented in training_pipeline/public_sources.yaml; the reachable 4 GB archive needs schema inspection before mapping classes into trash_object.

boundary: This model detects visible trash objects from public detection data. It supplements customer RB scene classification and should not be presented as an overflow / empty / full scene-status model.
